<!-- SECM Protocol — every change is anchored to the constitution. -->

## Linked RFC

<!-- Which RFC authorizes this change? "No line of code without a corresponding RFC" (Architect's Charter, principle 3).
     Class 1 (trivial) changes: state "Class 1 — trivial" and describe why no RFC is needed. -->

## Change class

- [ ] Class 1 — Trivial (typos, formatting, non-behavioral)
- [ ] Class 2 — Substantive (RFC required and linked above)
- [ ] Class 3 — Constitutional (RFC + amendment process, RFC-0001 §3)

## Checklist

- [ ] Implements the linked RFC exactly as specified — nothing beyond it
- [ ] No hidden transformations; everything auditable (RFC-0000 §22)
- [ ] Premortem exists in the linked RFC (RFC-0000 §18)
- [ ] Validation criteria met / benchmarks attached (RFC-0001 §6)
- [ ] No identifying personal data touches durable storage (Privacy Architecture, Tier 0)
- [ ] AI-authored work is labeled as such (RFC-0001 §7)
